channel.title: Fascinating Frontiers
channel.description: Daily space and astronomy news digest. Bringing the wonders of space exploration and astronomy discoveries to everyone.
channel.itunes:author: Patrick
channel.itunes:summary: Daily space and astronomy news digest. Bringing the wonders of space exploration and astronomy discoveries to everyone.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers - Episode 42 - February 22, 2026
item.description:
# Fascinating Frontiers **Date:** February 22, 2026 🚀 **Fascinating Frontiers** - Space & Astronomy News
**Quick scan:** Dive into groundbreaking missions and cosmic wonders today! If you only read 3: #1, #2, #5.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Space & Astronomy Stories 1. **German Firm Eyes Bid for Mynaric: 22 February 2026 • SpaceNews** Rheinmetall, a German defense company, is reportedly considering a bid for laser communications firm Mynaric, challenging Rocket Lab’s planned acquisiti...

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers - Episode 40 - February 18, 2026
item.description:
# Fascinating Frontiers **Date:** February 18, 2026 🚀 **Fascinating Frontiers** - Space & Astronomy News
**Quick scan:** Dive into lunar missions, cosmic collisions, and groundbreaking discoveries today! If you only read 3 today: #1, #3, #4.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Space & Astronomy Stories 1. **Moon Catapult Idea Revived: 18 February 2026 • Space.com** Elon Musk proposes a satellite catapult on the moon, echoing Gerard O'Neill's 1974 mass driver concept. This could revolutionize lu...

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers - Episode 39 - February 16, 2026
item.description:
# Fascinating Frontiers **Date:** February 16, 2026 🚀 **Fascinating Frontiers** - Space & Astronomy News
**Quick scan:** Uncover cosmic mysteries from comets to exoplanets today! If you only read 3 today: #1, #2, #4.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Space & Astronomy Stories 1. **Catch Comet Wierzchoś in Twilight: 16 Feb 2026 • Astronomy Magazine** Comet C/2024 E1 (Wierzchoś), now at 7th magnitude, is visible in the Northern Hemisphere during twilight. This rare sight near New Moon offers a ...

# Fascinating Frontiers **Date:** February 20, 2026 🚀 **Fascinating Frontiers** - Space & Astronomy News

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ### Top 15 Space & Astronomy Stories 1. **NASA Completes Artemis 2 Fueling Test: 19 Feb 2026 • SpaceNews** NASA successfully conducted a second wet dress rehearsal for Artemis 2 on February 19, resolving earlier hydrogen leak issues. This milestone ens...
